title: Remove all images
body:
Add -a/--all to rmi so a user can remove
all images quickly.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Should we allow arguments to be passed when --all is present? I think specifying image specific images is pointless when we already have the "all images must go" flag set.

Nevermind, already handled. I shouldn't be doing this on my day off.

LGTM

:pushpin: Commit f7ce758 has been approved by `mheon`
